name: FLARE NUINUI QUEST
short_description: Play as Shiranui Flare in this retro action platformer, wielding her dual pistols, as you explore the world on a quest to save your friends!
detailed_description:
Evil forces have emerged, spreading chaos across the land. Shiraken members went to investigate, but they haven't returned!

Play as Shiranui Flare in this retro action platformer, wielding her dual pistols Smile and Go (names subject to change), as you explore the world on a quest to save your friends!

The Quest

  • A vast lineup of Hololive members to meet, some will lend you their strength while others will challenge you as fierce bosses

  • Levels filled with power-ups, items and secrets

  • A soundtrack featuring a collection of 8-bit versions of Hololive songs

  • A range of challenging achievements for players eager to test their skills

  • Numerous checkpoints and helpful Elfriends for players seeking a more relaxed experience

But Wait, There's More!

Two additional quests await you! Play as Usada Pekora and Houshou Marine in their unique campaigns to uncover different aspects of the story and experience new gameplay styles!

If your controller doesn't respond, please try to “Disable Steam Input”.

This game is published under CCMC Corp(※1)'s Indie game brand "holo Indie".(※2)

This game is allowed to be monetized under the examination and terms of "holo Indie".

Please note that any monetized derivative work games that include Cover Corp.'s content outside of holo Indie is not covered by these terms and is not allowed.

※1. About CCMC Corp.

CCMC Corp. is entrusted with website management (ex: steam) including, examination, publishing and other necessary tasks by Cover Corp.

※2. About "holo Indie"

holo Indie's objective is to cooperate with hololive production fans and creators.

It is a game brand that offers "Game Creator Support Program" for the derivative work games.

For more details about "holo Indie", Please refer to the Cover Corp.'s "Derivative work guidelines".
